2604.08991.title: PinpointQA: A Dataset and Benchmark for Small Object-Centric Spatial Understanding in Indoor Videos
2604.08991.paper_summary: Small object-centric spatial understanding in indoor videos remains a significant challenge for multimodal large language models (MLLMs), despite its practical value for object search and assistive applications. Although existing benchmarks have advanced video spatial intelligence, embodied reasoning, and diagnostic perception, no existing benchmark directly evaluates whether a model can localize a target object in video and express its position with sufficient precision for downstream use. In this work, we introduce PinpointQA, the first dataset and benchmark for small object-centric spatial understanding in indoor videos. Built from ScanNet++ and ScanNet200, PinpointQA comprises 1,024 scenes and 10,094 QA pairs organized into four progressively challenging tasks: Target Presence Verification (TPV), Nearest Reference Identification (NRI), Fine-Grained Spatial Description (FSD), and Structured Spatial Prediction (SSP). The dataset is built from intermediate spatial representations, with QA pairs generated automatically and further refined through quality control. Experiments on representative MLLMs reveal a consistent capability gap along the progressive chain, with SSP remaining particularly difficult. Supervised fine-tuning on PinpointQA yields substantial gains, especially on the harder tasks, demonstrating that PinpointQA serves as both a diagnostic benchmark and an effective training dataset. The dataset and project page are available at https://rainchowz.github.io/PinpointQA.
2604.08991.paper_summary_zh: 小物體中心的室內視頻空間理解對於多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）來說仍然是一個重大挑戰，儘管它在物體搜索和輔助應用中的實際價值不容小覷。雖然現有的基準已經推進了視頻空間智能、具身推理和診斷感知，但目前沒有任何基準直接評估模型是否能夠在視頻中定位目標物體並以足夠的精確度表達其位置以供下游使用。在這項工作中，我們介紹了PinpointQA，這是首個針對室內視頻中小物體中心空間理解的數據集和基準。PinpointQA基於ScanNet++和ScanNet200構建，包含1,024個場景和10,094對問答（QA）對，這些對被組織成四個逐步挑戰的任務：目標存在驗證（TPV）、最近參考識別（NRI）、細粒度空間描述（FSD）和結構化空間預測（SSP）。該數據集基於中間空間表示構建，QA對自動生成並通過質量控制進一步精煉。對代表性MLLM的實驗顯示，隨著逐步鏈的推進，能力差距始終存在，SSP特別困難。在PinpointQA上進行的有監督微調產生了顯著的增益，特別是在較難的任務上，顯示PinpointQA既是一個診斷基準，也是有效的訓練數據集。該數據集和項目頁面可在 https://rainchowz.github.io/PinpointQA 獲得。
2604.08991.author: Zhiyu Zhou et.al.
2604.08991.authors: Zhiyu Zhou, Peilin Liu, Ruoxuan Zhang, Luyang Zhang, Cheng Zhang, Hongxia Xie, Wen-Huang Cheng
